a9617aff-be86-4ec0-ac76-dc3b63f6cea1.label: text_chunk
a9617aff-be86-4ec0-ac76-dc3b63f6cea1.text:
NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT (NDA)

This Nondisclosure Agreement (the "Agreement") is entered into by and between _______________ with its principal offices at _______________, ("Disclosing Party") and _______________, located at _______________ ("Receiving Party") for the purpose of preventing the unauthorized disclosure of Confidential Information as defined below.

faf2261f-0ae1-4b74-9f44-cc3b41b612c1.label: text_chunk
faf2261f-0ae1-4b74-9f44-cc3b41b612c1.text:
The parties agree to enter into a confidential relationship concerning the disclosure of certain proprietary and confidential information ("Confidential Information").1. Definition of Confidential Information .

 For purposes of this Agreement, "Confidential Information" shall include all information or material that has or could have commercial value or other utility in the business in which Disclosing Party is engaged.

f65d539f-2866-4ad5-8ae8-f3e2e0b6ee87.label: text_chunk
f65d539f-2866-4ad5-8ae8-f3e2e0b6ee87.text: If Confidential Information is in written form, the Disclosing Party shall label or stamp the materials with the word "Confidential" or some similar warning. If Confidential Information is transmitted orally, the Disclosing Party shall promptly provide writing indicating that such oral communication constituted Confidential Information.2. Exclusions from Confidential Information .

3dec495d-5aa1-41c2-b97a-81ca136cb8e5.label: text_chunk
3dec495d-5aa1-41c2-b97a-81ca136cb8e5.text: Receiving Party's obligations under this Agreement do not extend to information that is: (a) publicly known at the time of disclosure or subsequently becomes publicly known through no fault of the Receiving Party; (b) discovered or created by the Receiving Party before disclosure by Disclosing Party; (c) learned by the Receiving Party through legitimate means other than from the Disclosing Party or Disclosing Party's representatives;

effc543e-164d-4683-bfac-1127e137f763.label: text_chunk
effc543e-164d-4683-bfac-1127e137f763.text:
or (d) is disclosed by Receiving Party with Disclosing Party's prior written approval.

3. Obligations of Receiving Party . Receiving Party shall hold and maintain the Confidential Information in strictest confidence for the sole and exclusive benefit of the Disclosing Party.

658cfc07-b247-4460-9a6a-6eb8f494e9d2.label: text_chunk
658cfc07-b247-4460-9a6a-6eb8f494e9d2.text:
Receiving Party shall carefully restrict access to Confidential Information to employees, contractors and third parties as is reasonably required and shall require those persons to sign nondisclosure restrictions at least as protective as those in this Agreement.

 Receiving Party shall not, without the prior written approval of Disclosing Party, use for Receiving Party's benefit, publish, copy, or otherwise disclose to others, or permit the use by others for their benefit or to the detriment of Disclosing Party, any Confidential Information.

07f4d30a-d267-4847-a6f5-7d2836f1a284.label: text_chunk
07f4d30a-d267-4847-a6f5-7d2836f1a284.text:
Receiving Party shall return to Disclosing Party any and all records, notes, and other written, printed, or tangible materials in its possession pertaining to Confidential Information immediately if Disclosing Party requests it in writing.4.

 Time Periods .

1a0aa7e1-3227-4e6a-a464-9fcb56d0fbb3.label: text_chunk
1a0aa7e1-3227-4e6a-a464-9fcb56d0fbb3.text:
The nondisclosure provisions of this Agreement shall survive the termination of this Agreement and Receiving Party's duty to hold Confidential Information in confidence shall remain in effect until the Confidential Information no longer qualifies as a trade secret or until Disclosing Party sends Receiving Party written notice releasing Receiving Party from this Agreement, whichever occurs first.Copyright © 2018 NonDisclosureAgreement.com. All Rights Reserved.Page 1 of 2
5. Relationships .

04af7453-d3b0-4fec-891a-bf90af5912f2.label: text_chunk
04af7453-d3b0-4fec-891a-bf90af5912f2.text: Nothing contained in this Agreement shall be deemed to constitute either party a partner, joint venture or employee of the other party for any purpose.6. Severability . If a court finds any provision of this Agreement invalid or unenforceable, the remainder of this Agreement shall be interpreted so as best to affect the intent of the parties.7. Integration .

579411f2-37f1-47fd-9b41-9e16a907bf5b.label: text_chunk
579411f2-37f1-47fd-9b41-9e16a907bf5b.text: This Agreement expresses the complete understanding of the parties with respect to the subject matter and supersedes all prior proposals, agreements, representations, and understandings. This Agreement may not be amended except in writing signed by both parties.8. Waiver . The failure to exercise any right provided in this Agreement shall not be a waiver of prior or subsequent rights.9. Notice of Immunity .

fc7ae0b3-200b-4fc0-890e-9aa6174963f1.label: text_chunk
fc7ae0b3-200b-4fc0-890e-9aa6174963f1.text: Employee is provided notice that an individual shall not be held criminally or civilly liable under any federal or state trade secret law for the disclosure of a trade secret that is made (i) in confidence to a federal, state, or local government official, either directly or indirectly, or to an attorney; and (ii) solely for the purpose of reporting or investigating a suspected violation of law; or is made in a complaint or other document filed in a lawsuit or other proceeding,

9dd82be7-40bf-4100-beb4-44ab05312843.label: text_chunk
9dd82be7-40bf-4100-beb4-44ab05312843.text: if such filing is made under seal.

d4f25360-e72a-4473-b15a-8ab568afed0c.label: text_chunk
d4f25360-e72a-4473-b15a-8ab568afed0c.text: An individual who files a lawsuit for retaliation by an employer for reporting a suspected violation of law may disclose the trade secret to the attorney of the individual and use the trade secret information in the court proceeding, if the individual (i) files any document containing the trade secret under seal; and (ii) does not disclose the trade secret, except pursuant to court order.This Agreement and each party's obligations shall be binding on the representatives, assigns and successors of such party.

41eceb70-c457-4f98-b341-8ac4b21269ad.label: text_chunk
41eceb70-c457-4f98-b341-8ac4b21269ad.text:
Each party has signed this Agreement through its authorized representative.

DISCLOSING PARTY

Signature _____________________________________________________ Typed or Printed Name ___________________________ Date: _______________ RECEIVING PARTY Signature _____________________________________________________ Typed or Printed Name ___________________________ Date: _______________
Copyright © 2018 NonDisclosureAgreement.com. All Rights Reserved.Page 2 of 2

community_summary.0:
**Summary of Relationships:**

1. **Disclosing Party and Confidential Information**: The Disclosing Party is responsible for providing and disclosing Confidential Information to the Receiving Party. This includes sharing the information in both written and oral forms, ensuring it is properly labeled as confidential. The Disclosing Party serves as the source of this confidential material.

2. **Disclosing Party and Receiving Party**: The Disclosing Party has the authority to release the Receiving Party from the obligations of the agreement through written notice. This indicates a level of control and responsibility held by the Disclosing Party in managing the terms of their relationship with the Receiving Party.

Overall, the relationships emphasize the Disclosing Party's role in managing and sharing confidential information while also having the power to modify the obligations of the Receiving Party.

community_summary.7:
The relationships between the Receiving Party and the Disclosing Party revolve around the management and protection of Confidential Information. 

1. **Obligations**: The Receiving Party has specific obligations to handle the information provided by the Disclosing Party, as detailed in their agreement. This includes maintaining confidentiality and adhering to the terms set forth.

2. **Confidential Information**: The Receiving Party is required to hold Confidential Information in confidence, ensuring that it is not disclosed without proper authorization. This obligation is a critical aspect of their relationship.

3. **Disclosure Agreement**: The Receiving Party is bound by a Disclosure Agreement with the Disclosing Party, which outlines the responsibilities regarding the protection and non-disclosure of Confidential Information.

4. **Access Restrictions**: The Receiving Party must restrict access to Confidential Information, allowing only authorized individuals to view or handle this sensitive data, thereby safeguarding it from unauthorized access.

5. **Return of Materials**: Upon request, the Receiving Party is obligated to return any materials related to the Confidential Information to the Disclosing Party, reinforcing the direct responsibilities between the two parties concerning the handling of confidential data.

Overall, the relationship is characterized by a strong emphasis on confidentiality, protection of sensitive information, and clear obligations that the Receiving Party must fulfill to maintain trust and compliance with the Disclosing Party.

The relationships outlined involve a set of entities referred to as "Parties," which are engaged in a formal Agreement that governs their interactions and obligations.

community_summary.22:
The relationships summarized below highlight the key aspects of an Agreement and its implications for the involved Parties and the Client Brand:

1. **Agreement Composition**: The Agreement is structured with various **Clauses** that detail specific terms and conditions, establishing a comprehensive legal framework.

2. **Rights and Obligations**: The Agreement confers specific **rights and obligations** on the **Party**, ensuring accountability and defining the legal responsibilities within the relationship.

3. **Definitions**: It includes definitions for relevant **Acronyms**, clarifying terminology used throughout the document.

4. **Legislative Reference**: The Agreement references the **Electronic Communications and Transactions Act**, indicating that communications required to be in writing can be sent electronically, thus relying on this legislation for validity.

5. **Commencement**: The **Signature Date** signifies the commencement of the Agreement's terms, marking when the obligations and rights become effective.

6. **Enforceability**: The Agreement is enforceable against the **Party**, meaning that the Party is legally bound to adhere to its terms.

7. **Client Brand Benefits**: Provisions within the Agreement are designed to benefit the **Client Brand**, allowing it to accept these terms as a third party.

8. **Governance**: The Agreement governs the actions and responsibilities of the **Parties**, establishing a framework for their interactions and obligations.

9. **Execution**: The Agreement is formally **signed by the Parties**, indicating their consent and commitment to the terms outlined.

Overall, the Agreement serves as a foundational document that delineates the rights, responsibilities, and legal frameworks governing the interactions between the Parties and the Client Brand, ensuring clarity and enforceability in their relationship.

This relationship underscores the importance of having a defined legal context for resolving conflicts.
community_summary.24:
The relationships outlined in the knowledge graph highlight key aspects of contractual agreements and their implications:

2. **Signature Date and Client**: The 'Signature Date' is significant for the 'Client' as it signifies the formal acceptance of the agreement. This date marks the commencement of the Client's obligations under the contract, emphasizing its importance in the contractual timeline.

In summary, the relationships illustrate how warranties set the foundation for contractual obligations and breaches, while the Signature Date serves as a pivotal moment for the Client's responsibilities within the agreement.
